hero.headline: Architecting Intelligent Futures: Bridging Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Scalable Data Engineering for Transformative Solutions
hero.subtext: A Software Engineer with expertise in Python, Generative AI, RAG, LLMs, and Azure cloud platforms, dedicated to building robust, scalable AI systems and large language model applications that drive innovation and deliver tangible business value.

projects.title: On-Demand Service Platform with Agentic AI & RAG
projects.description: Architected a distributed microservices system leveraging REST APIs, Docker, and WebSockets to support concurrent users at scale. Integrated Agentic AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for dynamic pricing based on live data, projecting an 18% revenue uplift. Developed an LLM-powered chatbot for automated customer support, reducing manual query response time by 60%, and implemented real-time event-driven updates.

projects.title: Intelligent Email Campaign Automation with OpenAI
projects.description: Developed a Python-based automated email campaign tool integrating the OpenAI API for LLM-driven personalization at scale. Built a GUI dashboard for campaign scheduling, template management, and delivery analytics, utilizing Google Sheets API as a live backend.

projects.title: Indian Sign Language Real-Time ML Translation System
projects.description: Engineered a real-time ML inference pipeline for Indian Sign Language (ISL) to text and speech translation using TensorFlow and OpenCV. Optimized model inference for low-latency processing on resource-constrained devices, demonstrating practical application of machine learning for accessibility.

projects.title: Financial Data Lakehouse ETL Pipeline on Azure
projects.description: Architected and engineered an automated medallion ETL pipeline (Bronze -> Silver -> Gold) using Azure Databricks and PySpark. Implemented ACID transactions via Delta Lake and Z-Ordering on account keys, optimizing query latency by 40% for financial data lake BI systems.

certifications.title: Python for Data Science and AI
Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate (AI-102)

journey.title: Analyst – AI & Data Engineering
journey.subtitle: Capgemini
journey.description: Building automated ETL pipelines and data transformation workflows using Python and Azure Databricks for an enterprise-scale Financial Data Lake (FDL) BI engagement. Integrating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Generative AI techniques to enhance data querying and insight generation on large structured datasets. Developing Power BI dashboards tracking key performance metrics and working with Azure cloud-native services for scalable distributed data processing and ML model deployment.

journey.title: Software Engineering Intern – Python & RAG
journey.subtitle: Capgemini
journey.description: Developed Python-based backend services and integrated RAG pipelines to power intelligent document retrieval and response generation. Built and tested REST API endpoints, contributing to end-to-end feature delivery in an Agile sprint-based environment. Collaborated with cross-functional teams on deploying AI-powered features, gaining exposure to CI/CD workflows and distributed service architecture.

journey.title: Master of Computer Applications – Computer Science
journey.subtitle: Lovely Professional University (Jalandhar, India)
journey.description: Completed Master of Computer Applications with a CGPA of 8.35, focusing on advanced computer science concepts relevant to modern software development and data-intensive applications.

journey.title: Bachelor of Science – Mathematics & Computer Science
journey.subtitle: Deen Dayal Upadhyay Gorakhpur University (Gorakhpur, UP, India)
journey.description: Graduated with a Bachelor of Science degree, building a strong foundation in mathematics and computer science principles essential for analytical and technical roles.

blogs.title: Building Scalable ETL Pipelines with Azure Databricks for Financial Data Lakes
blogs.excerpt: Explore the architecture and implementation of robust ETL pipelines using Python and Azure Databricks, specifically tailored for handling large-scale financial datasets and enabling advanced BI analytics.

blogs.title: Leveraging Agentic AI and RAG for Dynamic Pricing in On-Demand Services
blogs.excerpt: Dive into how Agentic AI and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) can be integrated into microservices architectures to enable real-time, data-driven dynamic pricing and enhance customer support through LLM-powered chatbots.

blogs.title: Personalizing Email Campaigns with OpenAI: A Practical Guide to LLM Integration
blogs.excerpt: Learn how to build an automated email campaign tool using Python and the OpenAI API to generate personalized content at scale, improving engagement and campaign effectiveness.

blogs.title: Real-Time Indian Sign Language Translation: An ML Pipeline with TensorFlow & OpenCV
blogs.excerpt: Discover the technical challenges and solutions in developing a low-latency, real-time machine learning system for Indian Sign Language translation, from model optimization to deployment.

general.philosophy: My passion lies at the intersection of data and intelligence, where complex data ecosystems meet cutting-edge AI. I am driven by the challenge of transforming raw data into actionable insights and building intelligent systems that not only solve real-world problems but also scale efficiently. From architecting robust ETL pipelines to deploying advanced Generative AI and Machine Learning models, I believe in a holistic approach that combines engineering rigor with innovative AI capabilities to create truly transformative solutions.

data-engineer.philosophy: My philosophy as a Data Engineer is to forge robust, scalable, and intelligent data foundations that empower informed decision-making and fuel the next generation of AI applications. I am passionate about architecting efficient ETL pipelines, leveraging Azure Databricks, Apache Spark, and Delta Lake to transform raw data into a trusted, accessible asset. My goal is to build data ecosystems that are not only performant and reliable but also seamlessly integrate with advanced analytics and Generative AI, driving innovation and tangible business value.

ai-engineer.philosophy: My philosophy as an AI Engineer is to build intelligent systems that are not only innovative but also robust, scalable, and ethically sound. I am driven by the potential of Generative AI, RAG, and Agentic AI to solve complex real-world problems, transforming data into actionable intelligence. My passion lies in architecting and deploying cutting-edge LLM applications, ensuring they deliver tangible value and push the boundaries of what's possible in artificial intelligence.
